summary: 2026-06-22 21:41:54 PDT Re-reviewed `306720f...HEAD` and `306720f..HEAD` against `reviews/security-program.md`. The changes are limited to docs, workflows, Dependabot config, review artifacts, and the regenerated architecture PNG; no application logic changed. Four approved fixes are resolved, but one security-policy sentence still misses the approved CI ruleset alignment.

findings.title: Security policy still omits CI from ruleset requirement
findings.claim: The B4 fix adds `.github/workflows/ci.yml` and updates README, SSDLC, and dependency-management docs to say the `main` ruleset requires both CodeQL and CI checks, but this security policy still describes the ruleset as only `PR + passing CodeQL required`. Because this policy set is the questionnaire evidence, the branch-protection documentation remains inconsistent with the approved CodeQL+CI ruleset fix.
findings.suggestion: Update the security policy controls line to require `PR + passing CodeQL and CI checks`, and consider separating GitHub CI from Dependabot in the sub-processor note so the policy matches the rest of the security-program docs.
